title: Baspig Utils Lib
description: Just a small library, to make mod develop easier
body:
# Baspig Utils Lib - BPU

Are you insterested to suggest new features? Look at 
[this](https://github.com/BadpigStudios/Baspig-Utils/issues) and also [Discord](https://github.com/BadpigStudios/Baspig-Utils/issues)

This mod is a fabric library that needs Fabric API to make some repetitive code more accesible and less bulky.

Also it doesn't change any vanilla behavior.

You can help with mod incompatibilities.

## 📃 You can use this mod as dependency of yours, especially if you are a beginner dev.

This mod lib adds - This list will grow over time
  * Sound source object - A point of the world that will play a sound
  * More Easier:
    - Creative inventory tab creation.
    - Trim pattern addition.
    - Code config for block, entity and Item events (new events will be added).
    - Gui texture renderer (to be used on render methods with DrawContext, commonly mixins).
    - Basic TXT and JSON file management
  * Extra log actions
  * More utility classes: 
    - ClientInfo,
    - DimensionInfo,
    - Offset, [BlockPos]
    - ReturnType, [Enum]
    - ConsoleColors,
    - GeneralUtils.
    - And more...
  * Some new extra tags (new tags will be added).

## 📄 Usage Info
For everyone, if some mod you have needs this mod, just download it.

You want to use this as a dependency for your mod project? Check [github wiki page](https://github.com/BadpigStudios/Baspig-Utils) for more info about its features and installation

## 🪲 Bugs
If you found some bugs, please [report here](https://github.com/BadpigStudios/Baspig-Utils/issues), you help a lot when you discover them.
